summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Inspection Q&A UI/UX fixes (Iteration 57). All 4 requested fixes verified as working: 1) Q&A tab moved under Services alongside Packages, Categories, Offers tabs, 2) Category management (add/edit) within Q&A page via 'Manage Categories' modal, 3) Category column added to questions table, 4) Answer type selectors (MCQ/Photo/Video) now visible for both Sub-Question 1 and Sub-Question 2.
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 UI/UX fixes implemented correctly and verified
Q&A tab is now under Services page alongside Packages, Categories, Offers tabs (data-testid='qa-tab')
Category column is the first column in the questions table showing category badges
Manage Categories button opens modal with existing categories list and add/edit/delete functionality
Add Question modal shows Answer Type selector for main question with MCQ/Photo/Video options
Sub-Question 1 has its own 'Answer Type for Sub-Question 1' selector with MCQ/Photo/Video options
Sub-Question 2 has its own 'Answer Type for Sub-Question 2' selector with MCQ/Photo/Video options
Edit Category functionality works - clicking pencil icon opens edit form with pre-filled data and 'Update Category' button
Create Category functionality works - toast notification confirms 'Category created'
Minor: Console shows hydration warnings about <tr> inside <span> in LeadsPage - not related to Q&A feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 UI/UX fixes for Inspection Q&A verified: 1) Q&A tab under Services, 2) Category management modal, 3) Category column in table, 4) Answer type selectors for sub-questions. Existing categories: Brakes, Engine Health, Exterior Body, Tyres & Wheels. 4 sample questions exist with various answer types.

features_tested.Q&A_Tab_Location: PASS - Q&A tab appears under Services alongside Packages, Categories, Offers tabs
features_tested.Q&A_Page_Loading: PASS - Clicking Q&A tab loads the Q&A management page with data-testid='inspection-qa-page'
features_tested.Category_Column_In_Table: PASS - Category column is first column in questions table showing category badges
features_tested.Add_Question_Modal: PASS - Opens with Main Question section and Answer Type selector (MCQ/Photo/Video)
features_tested.Sub_Question_1_Answer_Type: PASS - Has its own 'Answer Type for Sub-Question 1' selector with MCQ/Photo/Video options
features_tested.Sub_Question_2_Answer_Type: PASS - Has its own 'Answer Type for Sub-Question 2' selector with MCQ/Photo/Video options
features_tested.Existing_Categories_List: PASS - Shows Brakes, Engine Health, Exterior Body, Tyres & Wheels with edit/delete actions
features_tested.Add_New_Category_Form: PASS - Has Name and Description fields with 'Add Category' button
features_tested.Create_Category: PASS - Successfully created TEST_New_Category with toast notification
features_tested.Edit_Category: PASS - Clicking pencil icon opens edit form with pre-filled data and 'Update Category' button
